page-netshield.name: Services: NetShield
page-netshield.description: Allow access to all NetShield pages and API endpoints

page-netshield-settings.name: Services: NetShield: Settings API
page-netshield-settings.description: Allow access to the NetShield settings API (CRUD on all config sections)

page-netshield-service.name: Services: NetShield: Service Control API
page-netshield-service.description: Allow starting, stopping, and reconfiguring the NetShield service

page-netshield-alerts.name: Services: NetShield: Alerts API
page-netshield-alerts.description: Allow access to NetShield alert history and statistics

page-netshield-devices.name: Services: NetShield: Devices API
page-netshield-devices.description: Allow access to NetShield device discovery and quarantine controls

page-netshield-policies.name: Services: NetShield: Policies API
page-netshield-policies.description: Allow access to NetShield policy management and enforcement

page-netshield-appsignatures.name: Services: NetShield: Application Signatures API
page-netshield-appsignatures.description: Allow management of NetShield application identification signatures

page-netshield-webcategories.name: Services: NetShield: Web Categories API
page-netshield-webcategories.description: Allow management of NetShield web content categories

page-netshield-targetlists.name: Services: NetShield: Target Lists API
page-netshield-targetlists.description: Allow management of NetShield domain and IP target lists

page-netshield-dns.name: Services: NetShield: DNS Filtering API
page-netshield-dns.description: Allow access to NetShield DNS filtering configuration

page-netshield-geoip.name: Services: NetShield: GeoIP API
page-netshield-geoip.description: Allow access to NetShield GeoIP country blocking configuration
